title: Bia's Week by the Ocean
description: Days, months, and times — through Bia's surfing schedule. Learn ON/IN/AT for time, and never capitalize a day's name again.
summary_pt_br: Dias, meses e horas usando a agenda de surf da Bia. Aprenda ON/IN/AT para tempo, a regra da letra maiúscula (dias e meses SEMPRE com inicial maiúscula em inglês) e como perguntar a hora.

scenes.subtitle_en: A calendar, a clock, and a wave
scenes.subtitle_pt: Um calendário, um relógio e uma onda

scenes.text_en:
Bia pinned a schedule on the rooftop wall.
'Monday at six — I surf, I don't stall.
Tuesday at noon — I study with Joca.
Wednesday for class. Thursday? Not a lot.
Friday I run. Saturday I rest.
Sunday at the beach — the day I love best.'
scenes.text_pt:
A Bia pregou o cronograma na parede do terraço.
'Segunda às seis — eu surfo, nem um passo atrasado.
Terça ao meio-dia — estudo com o Joca.
Quarta tem aula. Quinta? Pouca coisa, boca.
Sexta eu corro. Sábado eu descanso.
Domingo na praia — o dia que eu mais amo.'

scenes.title: CAPITAL letters — always
scenes.body_en: Days and months in English ALWAYS start with a capital letter, even mid-sentence: 'See you on Monday.' 'My birthday is in April.' This is different from Portuguese. Languages, nationalities, and names also get capitals.
scenes.body_pt: REGRA: dias, meses, idiomas e nacionalidades SEMPRE começam com letra maiúscula em inglês, mesmo no meio da frase. Diferente do português, onde é minúscula.

exercise.question: Which is spelled correctly?
exercise.explanation: First letter capital only: 'Monday'. Days always start with a capital in English.

scenes.text_en:
ON Monday, IN April, AT six in the morn'.
Three little words — they never are worn.
ON the day, IN the month, AT the hour —
Repeat it three times for preposition power.
scenes.text_pt:
ON na segunda, IN em abril, AT às seis da manhã.
Três palavrinhas que funcionam de verdade, irmã.
ON + dia, IN + mês, AT + hora exata —
Repita três vezes para a memória ficar grata.

exercise.question: Complete: 'I have class ___ Wednesday.' (which preposition?)
exercise.explanation: ON + day of the week. On Wednesday, on Friday, on my birthday.

exercise.question: Complete: 'My birthday is ___ July.' (which preposition?)
exercise.explanation: IN + month. In July, in 2026, in the morning.

exercise.question: Complete: 'The surf class starts ___ 6 a.m.'
exercise.explanation: AT + specific clock time. At 6 a.m., at noon, at 9:30.

scenes.title: Reading a clock
scenes.body_en: Two ways to say time: digital ('six fifteen') OR traditional ('quarter past six'). For 6:30 → 'six thirty' OR 'half past six'. For 6:45 → 'six forty-five' OR 'quarter to seven'. Both are natural — pick whichever feels fluent.
scenes.body_pt: Duas formas: digital (six fifteen = 6:15) ou tradicional (quarter past six = 6:15). 6:30 = six thirty OU half past six. 6:45 = six forty-five OU quarter to seven.

examples.en: It's 3:15 → quarter past three / three fifteen
It's 9:30 → half past nine / nine thirty
It's 10:45 → quarter to eleven / ten forty-five

exercise.question: The clock shows 7:30. Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: Both 'half past seven' and 'seven thirty' are natural English for 7:30. Native speakers use both.
exercise.hint_pt_br: 7:30 pode ser 'half past seven' OU 'seven thirty' — os dois são naturais.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Bia's Week by the Ocean". Days, months, and times — through Bia's surfing schedule. Learn ON/IN/AT for time, and never capitalize a day's name again. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Bia's Week by the Ocean". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Bia's Week by the Ocean'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Bia's Week by the Ocean".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
